access_logs.description: Information about the access logs configuration, including bucket, whether it is enabled, and the prefix.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the load balancer.

arn_suffix.description: The ARN suffix for the load balancer, which can be useful for constructing ARNs for related resources.

client_keep_alive.description: The time, in seconds, that the load balancer allows a client to keep connections alive.

connection_logs.description: Information about the connection logs configuration, including bucket, whether it is enabled, and the prefix.

customer_owned_ipv4_pool.description: The ID of the customer-owned IPv4 pool.

desync_mitigation_mode.description: The desynchronization mitigation mode applied to the load balancer.

dns_name.description: The DNS name of the load balancer.

dns_record_client_routing_policy.description: The client routing policy for DNS records.

drop_invalid_header_fields.description: Indicates whether to drop invalid header fields.

enable_cross_zone_load_balancing.description: Indicates whether cross-zone load balancing is enabled.

enable_deletion_protection.description: Indicates whether deletion protection is enabled for the load balancer.

enable_tls_version_and_cipher_suite_head.description: Indicates whether TLS version and cipher suite headers are enabled.

enable_waf_fail_open.description: Indicates whether the load balancer allows traffic if the web application firewall fails open.

enable_xff_client_port.description: Indicates whether the load balancer includes the X-Forwarded-For client port.

enable_zonal_shift.description: Indicates whether zonal shift is enabled.

enforce_security_group_inbound_rules_on_.description: Indicates the enforcement of security group inbound rules on PrivateLink traffic.

id.description: The ID of the load balancer.

idle_timeout.description: The idle timeout value, in seconds, for connections to the load balancer.

internal.description: Indicates whether the load balancer is internal.

ip_address_type.description: The type of IP addresses used by the load balancer, either IPv4 or dualstack.

load_balancer_type.description: The type of the load balancer, such as application or network.

name.description: The name of the load balancer.

preserve_host_header.description: Indicates whether to preserve the original host header.

security_groups.description: The security groups associated with the load balancer.

subnet_mapping.description: Information about the subnet mappings for the load balancer.

subnets.description: The subnets associated with the load balancer.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the load balancer.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC for the load balancer.

xff_header_processing_mode.description: The processing mode for X-Forwarded-For headers.

zone_id.description: The ID of the zone where the load balancer is located.
